ai_profile:
**Best Kept Secret 2026 Festival**  
Taking place from June 12 to 14, 2026, Best Kept Secret returns with a carefully curated lineup of 52 artists, spanning an eclectic mix of genres and global influences. Anchored in its commitment to musical discovery, the festival offers a diverse blend of sounds, with a strong representation of Electronic (6), Post-Punk (5), Hip-Hop (5), and Alternative Rock (4) among the most prominent styles. The lineup also highlights an experimental edge, with genres like Afro-psychedelic Funk, Minimal Synth, and Noise Rock adding unique textures to the program. With 98% of the artists featured on Spotify, attendees can easily explore the lineup beforehand.

The festival boasts impressive international representation, with acts hailing from 16 countries. The USA leads the lineup with 11 artists, followed closely by strong contributions from the Netherlands (10), the UK (6), and Australia (5). Notably, the festival features artists from regions like Ghana, South Africa, and Brazil, showcasing a commitment to bringing global sounds to its stages. This geographical diversity is complemented by a mix of genders, with female, non-binary, and mixed-gender acts making up approximately 35% of the lineup, reflecting an encouraging push for inclusivity.

With an average artist rating of 7.2 (based on 76.9% of the lineup), the festival maintains a high standard of talent, with nearly 30% of rated artists scoring above an 8. Best Kept Secret 2026 promises an exciting weekend of discovery, blending emerging talent with genre-defying sounds and a celebration of cultural and musical diversity, all set against the backdrop of its signature laid-back atmosphere.
